Description: Discriminator that routes all task-specific logic (eval metric selection; HP adjustment strategy; export format)
Clarifai user ID for platform operations
Clarifai application ID for platform operations
Target model identifier for export and registration
Clarifai dataset ID containing training data
Specific dataset version for reproducible training
JSON list of target classes/concepts
HuggingFace dataset name for LLM fine-tuning
Random seed (-1 = no fixed seed)
Training epochs per iteration (detection: 100, classification: 200, LLM: 1)
Per-device training batch size (detection: 16, classification: 64, LLM: 4)
Pretrained weight source for transfer learning
HuggingFace model ID for base LLM
L2 regularization strength (detection: 0.0001, classification: 0.01, LLM: 0.01)
Fraction of total steps used for LR warmup (classification: 0.0001, LLM: 0.06)
Number of warmup iterations (classification only; alternative to warmup_ratio)
Per-item learning rate; effective_lr = batch_size × num_gpus × per_item_lrate (detection: 0.001875, classification: 1.95e-5)
Minimum learning rate at end of cosine schedule
Number of frozen ResNet backbone stages (higher = more frozen; 0 = fully trainable)
Input image dimensions (detection: [min_side] or [H,W]; classification: single int for square crop)
Maximum aspect ratio multiplier when preserving aspect ratio
Whether to preserve original image aspect ratio during resize
Probability of random horizontal/vertical flip during training
Direction of random flip augmentation
Whether classes are mutually exclusive (single-label) or multi-label
Minimum number of data samples per training epoch
Batch size used for GPU memory benchmarking during export
Peak learning rate for LLM fine-tuning (direct value; not per-item)
Learning rate decay schedule type
LoRA adapter rank — controls adapter capacity (higher = more expressive but more VRAM)
LoRA scaling factor — typically set equal to lora_r
Dropout applied to LoRA adapter layers for regularization
Number of gradient accumulation steps; effective_batch = batch_size × grad_accum
Maximum input sequence length for tokenization
Whether to load base model in 4-bit quantization (saves ~75% VRAM)
Override num_epochs with fixed step count (-1 = use num_epochs)
Log training metrics every N steps
Save checkpoint every N steps
Generic threshold replacing ap_threshold — metric must pass this to accept model (detection AP: 0.50, classification accuracy: 0.85, LLM eval_loss: 1.5)
Maximum number of retrain attempts before declaring failure
Metric used for threshold comparison — 'auto' resolves to AP (detection), accuracy (classification), eval_loss (LLM)
Whether higher or lower metric is better — auto: maximize for AP/accuracy, minimize for loss
Resume from previous checkpoint on retrain (vs fresh start from pretrained weights)
Hyperparameter adjustment strategy for retrain iterations
JSON defining tunable HPs and their ranges/values — auto-generated per task_type if not provided
Multiply learning rate by this factor on each retry (schedule strategy)
Reduce frozen_stages by 1 on each retry iteration
Minimum metric improvement between iterations — stop early if improvement is below this
Detect train_loss vs eval_loss divergence and trigger regularization adjustments
JSON blob of HP overrides passed from decision step to train step — values override named params
Minimum detection confidence score for evaluation
IoU threshold for NMS during evaluation
Batch size for evaluation inference
JSON blob for task-specific eval settings (detection: score/iou thresholds; classification: topk; LLM: max_new_tokens/temperature)
How eval step obtains the checkpoint — artifact (download from store) or path (from prior train step)
Filesystem path to trained checkpoint (passed between train → eval steps)
Path to MMDetection/MMPretrain config file from train step
Path to evaluation results JSON (passed from eval → decision step)
Current loop iteration counter (incremented by decision step)
JSON array of all previous iteration configs + metrics (accumulated each iteration)
JSON blob output by decision step with adjusted HPs for next iteration
Multiply num_epochs by this factor on each retry to allow lower LR more convergence time
Maximum concurrent training runs for parallel grid/random search (requires withParam fan-out)
Slack/email webhook URL for failure notifications
Compound metric conditions (e.g., {"AP": ">=0.50", "AP50": ">=0.70"}) for stricter quality gates
